userStories.title: Implement devtimer report daily command
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a daily summary so I can see how I spent my coding time today.
acceptanceCriteria: Running 'devtimer report daily' prints a summary for today (local date)
Summary shows each project worked on, the total duration per project, and a grand total
Accepts optional --date flag in YYYY-MM-DD format to report on a past day: 'devtimer report daily --date 2025-03-10'
If no sessions recorded for the day, prints: 'No sessions recorded for <date>'

userStories.title: Implement devtimer report weekly command
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a weekly breakdown so I can spot which days I was most productive.
acceptanceCriteria: Running 'devtimer report weekly' prints a report for the current Monday–Sunday week
Each day is shown as a row with total duration and a simple bar (ASCII blocks scaled to the longest day)
Accepts optional --week flag (YYYY-MM-DD of any day in target week): 'devtimer report weekly --week 2025-03-03'
Grand total hours for the week shown at the bottom

userStories.title: Implement devtimer export command
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to export my session history to CSV so I can analyze it in a spreadsheet or invoice a client.
acceptanceCriteria: Running 'devtimer export' writes a CSV to stdout with columns: date, project, started_at, ended_at, duration_minutes, notes
All completed sessions are included; in-progress sessions are excluded
Accepts optional --output flag to write to a file instead of stdout: 'devtimer export --output sessions.csv'
Accepts optional --project flag to filter by project name
Accepts optional --from and --to flags (YYYY-MM-DD) to limit date range
